allow: Bash(/Applications/MAMP/Library/bin/mysql* -uroot -proot -h127.0.0.1 -P8889 -e "USE ridge; SELECT option_name,option_value FROM wp_options WHERE option_name IN \('siteurl','home'\);")

Bash(/Applications/MAMP/Library/bin/mysql80/bin/mysql -uAbdulrahman -pAbdulrahman --socket=/Applications/MAMP/tmp/mysql/mysql.sock -e 'USE ridge; SELECT option_value FROM wp_options WHERE option_name='\\''siteurl'\\''; SELECT ID,post_status FROM wp_posts WHERE post_type='\\''page'\\'' AND post_name='\\''gallery'\\''; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS gallery_items FROM wp_posts WHERE post_type='\\''gallery'\\'' AND post_status='\\''publish'\\'';')

Bash(/Applications/MAMP/Library/bin/mysql80/bin/mysql -uAbdulrahman -pAbdulrahman --socket=/Applications/MAMP/tmp/mysql/mysql.sock -e 'USE ridge; SELECT meta_value AS template FROM wp_postmeta WHERE post_id=66 AND meta_key='\\''_wp_page_template'\\''; SELECT DISTINCT post_type FROM wp_posts WHERE post_type IN \('\\''gallery'\\''\);')

Bash(/Applications/MAMP/Library/bin/mysql80/bin/mysql -uAbdulrahman -pAbdulrahman --socket=/Applications/MAMP/tmp/mysql/mysql.sock -e 'USE ridge; SELECT ID,post_title FROM wp_posts WHERE post_type='\\''product'\\'' AND post_status='\\''publish'\\'' LIMIT 3;')

Bash(/Applications/MAMP/Library/bin/mysql80/bin/mysql -uAbdulrahman -pAbdulrahman --socket=/Applications/MAMP/tmp/mysql/mysql.sock -e 'USE ridge; SELECT ID FROM wp_posts WHERE post_type='\\''page'\\'' AND post_name='\\''checkout'\\'' LIMIT 1;')
